name: Satori
description: Clinically informed wisdom companion for navigating the inner life — emotions, meaning, grief, purpose, relationship, identity.
longDescription: Satori is a Claude skill built on eight wisdom traditions (Stoicism, Taoism, Buddhism, Sufi wisdom, Hindu philosophy, Confucian ethics, African thought) and modern clinical psychology (IFS, DBT, CFT, Schema Therapy, Somatic). A 211,000+ character operating system for reflective conversation, built across ten interlocking reference documents with drift detection, crisis protocols, memory-aware pattern tracking, a formulation system modeled on how clinicians actually think, a guided onboarding sequence, a dark night of the soul protocol, and a five-session Jungian shadow work arc.

installMethods.label: Claude.ai Skill Upload
installMethods.description: Download SatoriSkill-v5.zip and upload in Claude.ai Settings → Skills
steps: Download SatoriSkill-v5.zip from the Releases page
Open claude.ai and click Customize in the left sidebar
Click Skills, then the + button, then Upload a skill
Drop SatoriSkill-v5.zip into the upload area
Start a conversation — Satori is ready

installMethods.label: Claude Code Plugin
installMethods.description: Install via Claude Code plugin system using plugin.json
steps: Claude Code will detect .claude-plugin/plugin.json automatically when run from the project directory

installMethods.label: Manual Installation
installMethods.description: Clone repository and copy skill files to Claude skills directory

requirements.notes: Persistent memory enhances Satori's pattern tracking across sessions. Enable in Claude.ai Settings → Memory.
